title: phanerostylis coahuilensis
intro: Phanerostylis coahuilensis, also known as the Coahuila phanerostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phanerostylis coahuilensis include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction.
